items.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200
items.summary: Valve has significantly increased the price of the Steam Deck - but now, it's also in stock. The 512GB Steam Deck OLED now costs $789, up from $549, while the 1TB model costs $9...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: CrowdStrike and Google take down botnet used by hackers to target software developers in supply chain attacks
items.summary: Cybercriminals used the Glassworm botnet to infect open source software projects with malware, and in turn hack the developers and companies that use that software.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: YouTube will automatically detect and label AI-generated videos
items.summary: It should be easier to tell at a glance if a YouTube video will contain AI-generated gunk.
